# MuleSoft Omni Gateway

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.13) of Omni Gateway documentation.
> See [Omni Gateway llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/gateway/llms-full.txt) for all the Omni Gateway documentation in one file.

## Content
